TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1968 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 30 a romi'ad masofoc ci Felipe VI , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Spain anini i ci Felipe VI, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 19 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i f…ô…ĺip…ô b~vi , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u spain anini i ¶i f…ô…ĺip…ô b~vi, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1968 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 30 a romi'ad masofoc ci Felipe VI , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Spain anini i ci Felipe VI, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 19 a romi'ad.
